utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check completeness: 
- property: includes selected property with details (address, type, size, accessibility features, closing date) and price — fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (cash purchase method, fees, land transfer tax, totals) — sufficiently specified. 
- legal_services: includes provider, services, costs (including inspection) and total — fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes provider, date, services, cost — fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utilities and healthcare setup, with costs and total — sufficiently specified. 
- total_budget: includes cost breakdown (property price, closing costs, moving, setup, total investment, deposit) — fully specified.
